# discord Provider

Manage Discord guild resources through the Discord REST API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    discord = {
      source  = "nomadsre/discord"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

# The bot token is read from the DISCORD_TOKEN env var by default.
# Set it explicitly here only if you need per-workspace credentials.
provider "discord" {
  # token = var.discord_bot_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Discord bot token. May be provided via the `DISCORD_TOKEN` environment variable.
